input.headline: UK investors pull out of London stock market at record pace

raw.headline: UK investors pull out of London stock market at record pace

winner: Investors are literally pulling out—turns out the UK stock market's exit strategy involves a lot more fire extinguishers than IPOs.

candidates.text: Investors are fleeing the London stock market like taxis on a rainy day—because apparently, even financial markets don’t want to get stuck in the rain anymore.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "The joke is concise, surprising, and specific, drawing a clever analogy between taxis avoiding rain and investors fleeing the market."}

candidates.text: Why did the UK investor bring a ladder to the stock market? Because they wanted to see if there was any height left before jumping ship!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat related to the headline but lacks specificity and the surprise element is weak. The ladder metaphor is a bit generic and doesn't strongly tie into the record pace of investors pulling out."}

candidates.text: Why did the UK investor bring a ladder to the stock market? Because they were trying to climb out at record speed!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat related to the headline and uses a play on words with 'climb out' and 'record speed,' but the connection to UK investors pulling out of the London stock market is weak and not very specific. The humor is mild and lacks strong surprise or originality."}

candidates.text: Why did the investor bring a ladder to the stock market? To jump *in* before they jumped *out*—it's all about timing!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat clever with the wordplay on 'jump in' and 'jump out,' but it's a bit generic and doesn't directly tie to the headline about UK investors leaving the London stock market at record pace."}

candidates.text: Investors are literally pulling out—turns out the UK stock market's exit strategy involves a lot more fire extinguishers than IPOs.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 7.5, "reason": "The joke is clever with a good play on 'exit strategy' and includes specific references to fire extinguishers and IPOs. It's concise and surprising but could be more tightly focused for maximum impact."}
